results.title: New Relic Node.js Agent
results.description: This package instruments your Node.js application for performance monitoring with New Relic, providing insights into transactions, traces, and application health.

results.title: New Relic Monitoring for .NET
results.description: New Relic's .NET agent monitors your .NET applications, providing an end-to-end view of their performance across all .NET compatible languages like C# and VB.NET.

results.title: New Relic Ruby Agent
results.description: The New Relic Ruby agent monitors Ruby applications to identify and solve performance issues, and collect business data to improve customer experience and make data-driven business decisions.

results.title: New Relic Flutter Agent
results.description: The New Relic Flutter Agent instruments Flutter applications with native New Relic Android and iOS agents to collect crashes, network traffic, and other information for hybrid apps.

results.title: New Relic
results.description: New Relic is an observability platform that provides deep visibility into systems, applications, and infrastructure. It helps users monitor, troubleshoot, and improve digital performance across various technologies.

results.title: New Relic Go Agent
results.description: The New Relic Go Agent monitors Go applications by tracking transactions, outbound requests, database calls, and providing runtime insights into goroutine activity, garbage collection, and memory usage.

results.title: New Relic Terraform Provider
results.description: Automate the configuration of New Relic resources using the New Relic Terraform provider, enabling infrastructure as code for your observability platform.

results.title: Elastic APM Node.js Agent
results.description: The official Node.js application performance monitoring (APM) agent for Elastic Observability, designed to automatically capture errors, tracing data, and performance metrics from Node.js applications.

results.title: LiveKit Agents JS
results.description: Build realtime multimodal AI agents with Node.js

results.title: wreq-js
results.description: A high-performance HTTP client for Node.js with real-browser TLS and HTTP/2 fingerprints, powered by Rust, designed to evade modern detection systems like Akamai and Cloudflare.

results.title: Dark Visitors Node.js SDK
results.description: This library provides convenient access to Dark Visitors from server-side TypeScript or JavaScript, enabling agent analytics and automatic robots.txt generation.

results.title: Agent Browser
results.description: Agentic Browser is a powerful browser assistant with embedded AI capabilities, combining React, Tauri, and Node.js to answer questions about web pages and interact with content.

results.title: Pulumi New Relic
results.description: The New Relic provider for Pulumi allows users to manage New Relic resources, such as applications, dashboards, and alerts, using infrastructure as code.

results.title: noblox.js
results.description: A Node.js wrapper for interacting with the Roblox API, enabling operations from the Roblox website to be executed via NodeJS for community management and in-game scripting.

results.title: Pulumi New Relic Provider
results.description: The Pulumi New Relic Provider enables users to manage New Relic resources and configurations as infrastructure as code. It integrates with New Relic's monitoring and observability platform to automate the deployment and management of alerts, dashboards, applications, and more.

results.title: Relic
results.description: Relic is a Clojure(Script) data structure providing a functional relational programming model with features like an in-memory database, declarative queries, constraints, and reactive capabilities.

results.title: Redis Node.js Client
results.description: Node-Redis is a modern, high-performance Redis client for Node.js, offering support for all Redis commands and various packages for specific Redis modules.

results.title: LiveKit Agents Starter - Node.js
results.description: A complete starter project for building voice AI applications using LiveKit Agents for Node.js and LiveKit Cloud, featuring a customizable voice AI assistant, model integration, turn detection, and noise cancellation.

results.title: Nodemem JS
results.description: Inspired by LangMem, nodemem-js is a fast, in-memory vector database for Node.js, designed for efficient similarity search of vector embeddings. Perfect for building chat agent memory and semantic retrieval systems.

results.title: Rete.js
results.description: Rete.js is a JavaScript framework for node-based editing, enabling the creation of visual programming editors and complex dataflow applications.

results.title: Microsoft 365 Agents SDK for NodeJS / TypeScript
results.description: The Microsoft 365 Agent SDK for NodeJS / TypeScript simplifies building full-stack, multichannel, and trusted agents for platforms like M365, Teams, and Copilot Studio, providing building blocks for user interactions, orchestration, and reasoning.

results.title: Crisp API Wrapper
results.description: A Node.js wrapper for the Crisp API, enabling authentication, sending messages, fetching conversations, and accessing agent accounts from JavaScript code.

results.title: Neo-neo-blessed
results.description: Neo-neo-blessed is a modernized fork of the original blessed library, providing a curses-like, high-level terminal interface API for Node.js with ES6 class support, bug fixes, and maintenance while maintaining full backward compatibility.

results.title: Agentuity SDK
results.description: The Agentuity TypeScript SDK is a toolkit for building, deploying, and managing AI agents in Node.js and Bun, enabling multi-agent architectures, event-driven design, and rich content handling.

results.title: Superagent
results.description: Superagent is a small progressive client-side HTTP request library and Node.js module with the same API, supporting many high-level HTTP client features, maintained for Forward Email and Lad.

results.title: AI SDK (llmstxt)
results.description: Learn how to build a retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) agent using the AI SDK and Next.js, enabling LLMs to access and utilize external information.

results.title: Bottleneck
results.description: Bottleneck is a lightweight, zero-dependency Task Scheduler and Rate Limiter for Node.js and the browser, supporting clustering with Redis.

results.title: Node ARI Client
results.description: A Node.js client library for the Asterisk REST Interface (ARI), providing an improved, Asterisk-specific API built upon swagger-js.

results.title: VK MAX Node.js Client
results.description: Node.js клиент для мессенджера VK MAX (OneMe) с полной поддержкой TypeScript, предоставляющий функциональность для подключения, аутентификации, отправки и обработки сообщений, а также управления профилем и группами.

results.title: RAG Agent
results.description: Learn how to build a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) Agent using the AI SDK and Next.js to provide LLMs with specific, relevant information beyond their training data.
